title: 有馬記念の後に・道はまだ遠く……

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek fights hard against some formidable
opponents but fails to emerge victorious.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She accepts the results, resolving to stay
level-headed and continue improving.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the race, she reflects on our hardships and
how those trials have helped us grow.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She then expresses her hope to race in the Osaka
Hai next.
